description: Copper Point of Sale is open. As the B2B sales manager, configure the customer database using the files on your Desktop. Import the retail customers from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\existing_customers.csv and add the six corporate clients from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\corporate_accounts.txt: Pacific Northwest Distributors (GOLD, $25,000 credit), Midwest Retail Holdings (SILVER, $15,000 credit), Southern Fashion Group (GOLD, $30,000 credit), Great Lakes Supply Co. (BRONZE, $5,000 credit), Atlantic Coast Trading (SILVER, $12,000 credit), and Mountain West Goods (BRONZE, $7,500 credit). For each corporate client, record the Company, Contact name, Email, Phone, Address, and Notes including their tier and credit limit. Update the notes for Sheryl Baxter ('Preferred Account: Yes'), Preston Lozano ('Preferred Account: Yes'), and Roy Berry ('Preferred Account: No, Past Due Balance'). Export the final customer list to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\customer_accounts.csv.

existing_customers_to_update.name: Roy Berry
existing_customers_to_update.update: Preferred Account: No, Past Due Balance
